name: balanced
description: Balanced gate for mobile-only HITL contexts. The user can approve or redirect via mobile notifications but cannot do deep-dive corrections. Stricter than lenient because failures may not be surfaced until a window of full attention; looser than strict because brief intervention is possible.
notes: Mobile-only HITL profile. Verification and rollback both required because deep-dive correction is not available during fragmented-attention windows. Budget margin moderate (1.2x) to absorb minor estimation drift without forcing an interrupt. Reconsider if work surfaces a need for full-supervision-mode escalation more than 2x per week.
